cards.content:
# Remote Access — Cytech Smart Home

{% set dev_id = states('sensor.device_id') %}
{% if dev_id and 'Initializing' not in dev_id %}
Your permanent remote access link:

> ### [https://{{ dev_id }}.tailad4a00.ts.net](https://{{ dev_id }}.tailad4a00.ts.net)

---

**🌐 Browser Access**

Scan with your phone camera to open in a browser:

![Remote Access QR](/local/remote_access_qr.png?v={{ dev_id }})

---

**📱 Home Assistant Companion App**

**On home Wi-Fi:** Open the app → tap + → it finds this system automatically.

**Away from home:** Open the app → Add Server → Manually Add Server → type:

`https://{{ dev_id }}.tailad4a00.ts.net`

{% else %}
> ⏳ **Generating Secure Remote Link... Please wait up to 3 minutes, then refresh this page.**
{% endif %}

*Do not share this link outside your household.*
